items.h: AEW's MVP Recalls Finding Out Vince Russo Was Secretly Ghost Writing TNA Impact
items.p: During MVP's time with TNA, Vince Russo was still serving as a writer, but it was being kept secret in an attempt to appease Spike TV.

items.h: Update On Lack Of NJPW Talent On AEW Forbidden Door
items.p: With AEW's Forbidden Door event set for next weekend, it appears talents from the different promotions featured are still unsure of their statuses on the card.

items.h: Thunder Rosa Finds Partner For AEW Women's Tag Title Match At Forbidden Door
items.p: Thunder Rosa has recruited a CMLL star in her quest to capture the AEW Women's Tag Team Championships at Forbidden Door.

items.h: HENARE Challenges Any Team To Step Up At AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door
items.p: HENARE issues a challenge for Forbidden Door. The lineup for AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door is filling out, but the IWGP Tag Team Champions are without a match. On social media, HENARE issued a...

items.h: AEW's FTR Announces Hiatus From Wrestling
items.p: Former AEW World Tag Team Champions FTR, Cash Wheeler and Dax Harwood, announce their plan to take a hiatus from pro wrestling.

items.h: AEW Star Thunder Rosa Wasn't Sure She'd Return To The Ring After Latest Injury
items.p: Former AEW Women's Champion Thunder Rosa reveals that she wasn't sure if her latest injury would yield an in-ring comeback.

items.h: IWGP Tag Team Champions issue challenge for AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door
items.p: IWGP Tag Team Champions HENARE & Great-O-Khan are ready to wrestle at AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door. HENARE and Great-O-Khan don’t currently have a match scheduled for the Sunday, June 28 pay-per-view...

items.h: Martha Hart receives award for her work with the Owen Hart Foundation
items.p: Dr. Martha Hart has been named the 2026 Calgarian of the Year. The founder of the Owen Hart Foundation was honored with the award at the 2026 Calgary Awards, which were held Wednesday, June 17 at...
